text: The world here is modern, bright, and almost clinical in its precision. As I enter this exhibit, I perceive a space dedicated to research and discovery—R + D, it boldly states. I experience a mingling of curiosity and humility, knowing I stand on the threshold of knowledge being created and shared. There is a silent anticipation, as if every display is an invitation to interrogate not only the world, but myself. I feel engaged, yet slightly overwhelmed by the orderly complexity around me.
